cards.front: What is the main difference between the Chalk and Talk method and PowerPoint Presentation Process?
cards.back: Chalk and Talk method involves lecturing and note-taking, while PowerPoint Presentation Process involves lecturing with visual aids

cards.front: What is the primary objective of the Chalk and Talk method?
cards.back: To create an interactive learning experience, encourage participation, and clarify concepts

cards.front: What is the main benefit of using PowerPoint Presentation Process?
cards.back: It helps to engage students, illustrate complex concepts, and retain information better

cards.front: What is the role of the teacher in the Chalk and Talk method?
cards.back: The teacher acts as a facilitator, guiding the students through the discussion and providing clarification

cards.front: What is the key to an effective PowerPoint Presentation Process?
cards.back: Using clear headings, concise language, and relevant images or diagrams to support the lecture
